claim: Open-source agent frameworks provide comparable functionality to commercial platforms at lower cost with better customization
actionable: Evaluate open-source agent frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, etc.) before adopting commercial solutions; cost and customization may favor OSS
source_title: Beating Cowork with Open Source Cowork

claim: Self-hosted agent infrastructure enables full control over data, model selection, and deployment but requires more engineering overhead
actionable: For sensitive data or custom requirements, self-host agent infrastructure; budget for engineering maintenance and monitoring
source_title: Beating Cowork with Open Source Cowork
